key_points: Interested in real-time latency monitoring for fleet tracking.
Mentioned current tool (Tableau) is too slow for operational decisions.
Concerned about API integration complexity with legacy ERP.
summaries.next_steps: Send technical documentation on API hooks and pricing for Pro tier.

key_points: Focus on cost attribution across AWS multi-region deployments.
Struggling with 'black box' billing in their proprietary platform.
Budget is approved for Q4, but needs to prove ROI to the CFO.
summaries.next_steps: Provide a case study on AWS cost reduction via Foundry.

key_points: Primary pain point is HIPAA-compliant data visualization.
Expressed frustration with manual reporting cycles taking 3 days.
Inquired about the 'Foundry Shield' security add-on.
summaries.next_steps: Schedule a deep-dive with the Security Compliance lead.

key_points: Needs automated anomaly detection for fraud prevention.
Currently using a custom Python script that requires constant maintenance.
Asked if Foundry supports Snowflake native integration.
summaries.next_steps: Confirm Snowflake connector capabilities and performance benchmarks.

key_points: Looking to monitor smart meter data ingestion at scale.
Expressed personal interest in the 'Sustainability Dashboard' feature.
Stalled due to internal reorganization of the Data Engineering team.
summaries.next_steps: Follow up after the team reorg is finalized (estimated 2 weeks).

key_points: Evaluating Foundry vs. Looker for executive-level reporting.
Pointed out that 'drill-down' capabilities are the most important factor.
Mentioned they are hiring 4 new analysts who would be primary users.
summaries.next_steps: Send a screen recording of the advanced drill-down workflow.

key_points: Interested in customer lifetime value (CLV) predictive modeling.
Currently lacks a unified view of omnichannel sales data.
Budget is tight; looking for a pilot program or phased rollout.
summaries.next_steps: Draft a pilot proposal focusing on the Shopify-Foundry connector.

key_points: Technical deep dive on data encryption at rest and in transit.
Highly impressed by the speed of the SQL workbench.
Decision-maker is the CTO, who was missing from this call.
summaries.next_steps: Coordinate a 15-minute executive demo for the CTO.

key_points: Needs to automate lab result aggregation across three global sites.
Mentioned that data silos are causing delays in R&D timelines.
Discussed the need for SSO (Okta) integration.
summaries.next_steps: Provide documentation on multi-region data residency controls.

key_points: Interested in IoT sensor data analysis for predictive maintenance.
Concerned about the learning curve for non-technical staff.
Noted that 'out-of-the-box' templates are a major selling point.
summaries.next_steps: Share a list of pre-built IoT templates available in Foundry.
